Euclid Surface Photometry Pipeline
  • Changelog
  • View page source

Changelog

Version 0.1.2

  • Added sb_threshold parameter to M5 to apply a rest-frame surface brightness cut before the change-point analysis.

  • Parallel execution via multiprocessing.Pool in euclid_profile_pipeline_pool.py.

  • Extended master profile in M3 to the maximum \(R_\mathrm{max}\) across all bands.

Version 0.1.1

  • Background estimation in M3 upgraded to the background_estimation_euclid adaptive method; sigma-clipped fallback retained.

  • Cosine-similarity filter added to M1 mask generation.

  • MTObjects deblending integrated into M1.

Version 0.1.0

  • Initial release.

  • Five-module pipeline: cutouts, isophote fitting, multi-band profiles, photometry, and disc break classification.

  • Applied to Euclid Q1 dataset (8 748 disc galaxies).

Previous
